equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the port shares sovereign-agent delivery metric extraction between builder and verifier, but it lacks shared image/audio/video delivery metric extraction and explicitly rejects image/audio/video/FHE two-phase families from the v2 delivery path.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing shared ritual-async-fees extraction semantics for image, audio, and video Phase 2 delivery metadata, and the local builder/verifier reject those two-phase families instead of using common offsets and helpers.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs exposes extract_agent_metrics_from_delivery and calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work for sovereign-agent delivery metrics only.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs uses extract_agent_metrics_from_delivery for SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE, then falls back to calculate_async_fees_phase2 for other delivery families.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs calculate_async_fees_phase2 supports LONG_RUNNING_HTTP, ZK_TWO_PHASE, and PERSISTENT_AGENT only; image/audio/video are not accepted.

crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs and crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs both restrict supported two-phase precompiles to long-running HTTP, ZK, sovereign-agent, and persistent-agent.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs has a test named supported_two_phase_helper_rejects_unported_fee_families covering image, audio, video, and FHE.

rationale: The commit message labels the move consensus critical and says the goal is eliminating builder/verifier divergence. The primary diff removes local extraction functions from the payload builder, adds shared ABI offset constants and extraction helpers to ritual-async-fees, and updates verifier extraction to use those shared constants. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Payload building and block verification must extract Phase 2 delivery metadata for agent, image, audio, and video calls using the same ABI offsets and extraction semantics from ritual-async-fees.
suggested_falsification_tests: For each supported Phase 2 delivery type, encode a settlement/delivery_result with known agent iterations/tool calls, image dimensions, audio duration, and video dimensions/duration; assert payload-builder fee selection and block-verifier expected-fee calculation extract the same values. Then mutate an offset or truncate the delivery_result and assert both paths fail consistently.
summary: Shared builder/verifier delivery extraction is incomplete for image/audio/video, so this invariant is a confirmed gap.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode Phase 2 delivery results for image, audio, and video with known dimensions/durations and attempt builder/verifier settlement fee calculation; current local code should reject the families as unsupported or fail fee calculation instead of extracting shared metrics.
title: Builder and verifier share delivery extraction semantics
